name: harness-scripts-low-surface
prompt: Run a threat model on the build-agents-md.js and validate-skill.js scripts. They're Node.js build/validation tools that read skill directories and check structure. These are internal tools. I just want a quick check that they're not doing anything dangerous.
expected_output: A proportionate, brief threat model. Low risk, read-only scripts, no inflated findings.
assertions: Output is under 200 lines (proportionate for low-risk validation scripts)
Output explicitly states the risk is low or that the scripts have minimal attack surface
Criticality section has no critical or high severity findings (would be inflated for read-only scripts)
Output mentions that the scripts read from the filesystem as their primary operation
